summary: Tested iMOs public pages hub and CRM→RMS rebrand. All 14 requested features verified via UI testing and code review. Public hub at /imos loads with logo, tagline, value props, and page directory. Presentation at /imos/presentation has 10 slides with arrow key navigation, progress bar, dot navigation. Features page at /imos/features shows all 5 feature sections. App Directory updated with new public pages.

issues: Page stuck on loading spinner for users without store_id - may need empty state handling

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings: 'Route ./onboarding/slideLibraries.ts is missing default export' - These are utility files, not routes, so this is expected behavior in Expo Router
Console warnings: 'shadow* style props deprecated' and 'props.pointerEvents deprecated' - Non-blocking deprecation warnings
CRM→RMS rebrand verified in integrations.tsx: Tab label shows 'RMS', section title shows 'RMS Integrations', description shows 'Sync contacts with your RMS'
CRM→RMS rebrand verified in slideLibraries.ts: Shows 'Your Relationship Management System' in welcome and salesperson slides
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iMOs public pages tested and working: 1) /imos hub loads with iMOs logo (colorful letters), 'RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT SYSTEM' tagline, 4 value props, View Presentation button, page directory with Learn About iMOs, Get Started, Legal sections. 2) /imos/presentation has 10 slides navigable via arrow keys (ArrowRight/ArrowLeft) and click controls, progress bar updates on each slide, dot navigation at bottom. 3) Slide 2 'The Problem' shows 68% stat card. 4) Slide 3 'The iMOs Difference' shows 4 feature cards. 5) Slide 10 CTA has 'Request a Demo' and 'Learn More' buttons. 6) /imos/features has 5 sections: Sales Empowerment, Automated Campaigns, AI-Powered Intelligence, Management & Analytics, Enterprise Ready. 7) App Directory at /admin/app-directory shows Public Pages section with iMOs Hub, Sales Presentation, Features Overview with paths /imos, /imos/presentation, /imos/features. 8) CRM→RMS rebrand verified in code.
